title: thevetia amazonica
intro: Thevetia amazonica, also known as Yellow Cassia, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloids, including thevetin and thevetin B. The health benefits of Thevetia amazonica include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
